indications.text:
2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION
2.1 Adults and Adolescents 12 years of age and older
2.2 Children 6 to 11 years of age
2.3 Administration Information
3 DOSAGE FORMS AND STRENGTHS

PATANASE is indicated for the relief of the symptoms of seasonal allergic rhinitis in adults and pediatric patients 6 years
of age and older.

PATANASE† Nasal Spray is an H receptor antagonist indicated for the relief of the symptoms
1
of seasonal allergic rhinitis in adults and children 6 years of age and older.
